# feishu-bridge 配置项

<!-- GENERATED by rtime_config.schema_to_markdown — do not edit by hand. Regenerate: python -m rtime_config <module:Model> and review the diff. -->

| 字段 | env 名 | 类型 | 默认值 | 秘密 | 生效 | 说明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `app_id` | `FEISHU_APP_ID` | string | null | `null` | 是 | restart | Feishu/Lark app id. Secret. Falls back to config_json's "appId"/"app_id" when unset (bot_config._load_feishu_credentials). |
| `app_secret` | `FEISHU_APP_SECRET` | string | null | `null` | 是 | restart | Feishu/Lark app secret. Secret. Falls back to config_json's "appSecret"/"app_secret" when unset. |
| `config_json` | `FEISHU_CONFIG_JSON` | string | `~/.config/rtime-assistant/feishu.json` |  | restart | Path to the credential JSON file read when FEISHU_APP_ID/FEISHU_APP_SECRET are unset. The path itself is not secret; the file holds the (secret) appId/appSecret. |
| `claude_cli` | `CLAUDE_CLI_PATH` | string | `claude` |  | restart | The claude CLI / claude-rtime wrapper. from_env resolves CLAUDE_CLI_PATH then PATH then the literal 'claude'. |
| `model` | `DEFAULT_MODEL` | string | `""` (empty) |  | hot | Default model; "" => model_routing.default_model() (wrapper default = kimi-code). Production sets DEFAULT_MODEL explicitly. |
| `default_cwd` | `DEFAULT_CWD` | string | `~` |  | restart | Where the model runs. ~ expanded (default = $HOME). |
| `permission_mode` | `PERMISSION_MODE` | string | `default` |  | restart | Model CLI permission mode (default / acceptEdits / bypassPermissions / plan). |
| `mcp_config` | `FEISHU_MCP_CONFIG` | string | null | `null` |  | restart | MCP config passed to the claude CLI (inline JSON or a path). Empty/unset => None => the CLI keeps using ~/.claude.json mcpServers + the /mnt/brain mount (no behaviour change). Set it to opt into --strict-mcp-config (IGNORES ~/.claude.json). 重启级。 |
| `archive_root` | `FEISHU_ARCHIVE_ROOT`, `RTIME_CHAT_ARCHIVE_ROOT` | string | null | `null` |  | restart | 通道无关聊天归档根(design chat-archive-storage §1):设置即启用 rtime_chat_runtime.archive 的按日分片 envelope 归档(<root>/raw/feishu/YYYY/MM/DD/events.jsonl);None=飞书零归档(现状)。重启级。 |
| `archive_mode` | `FEISHU_ARCHIVE_MODE` | string | `events` |  | restart | 归档模式 off\|events\|full(design 配置面):off=不落盘;events=raw envelope 层;full=预留(A2 transcript)。仅当 archive_root 设置时生效。重启级。 |
| `model_aliases_json` | `MODEL_ALIASES_JSON` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Extra model aliases as a JSON object, extending/overriding the registry base aliases (model_routing.base_aliases()). Empty => base only. |
| `allowed_users` | `ALLOWED_USERS` | array<string> | `[]` (empty) |  | hot | Comma-separated Feishu open_id whitelist for private messages. |
| `allowed_chats` | `ALLOWED_CHATS` | array<string> | `[]` (empty) |  | hot | Comma-separated group chat_id whitelist. |
| `admin_users` | `ADMIN_USERS` | array<string> | `[]` (empty) |  | hot | Comma-separated admin open_id set. Empty => defaults to allowed_users (向后兼容, matches the legacy `or set(ALLOWED_USERS)`). |
| `require_mention_in_group` | `REQUIRE_MENTION_IN_GROUP` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Require an @-mention of the bot to answer in group chats (REQUIRE_MENTION_IN_GROUP=0 disables). |
| `owner_personal_library_access` | `FEISHU_OWNER_PERSONAL_LIBRARY_ACCESS` | boolean | `false` |  | restart | Allow the owner's personal-data library subtree in tool scope (tool_policy). Off by default. FEISHU_OWNER_PERSONAL_LIBRARY_ACCESS=1 opts in. |
| `sessions_dir` | `FEISHU_SESSIONS_DIR` | string | `~/.feishu-claude` |  | restart | Session-id store; independent from the QQ bridge. ~ expanded. Was a hard-coded ~/.feishu-claude before this migration (default unchanged). |
| `callback_port` | `CALLBACK_PORT` | integer | `9981` |  | restart | Optional HTTP callback/health-check port; card buttons prefer the Feishu WebSocket event channel. |
| `stream_chunk_size` | `STREAM_CHUNK_SIZE` | integer | `20` |  | restart | Streaming card update: push once per this many accumulated chars. |
| `message_debounce_seconds` | `MESSAGE_DEBOUNCE_SECONDS` | number | `0.0` |  | restart | Burst debounce window: merge near-simultaneous text messages in one chat before invoking the model. 0 = off (the Python default; enable in prod env/Compose). |
| `message_debounce_max_messages` | `MESSAGE_DEBOUNCE_MAX_MESSAGES` | integer | `20` |  | restart | Max messages merged in one debounce window. |
| `message_debounce_max_chars` | `MESSAGE_DEBOUNCE_MAX_CHARS` | integer | `12000` |  | restart | Max chars merged in one debounce window. |
| `status_heartbeat_seconds` | `STATUS_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS` | number | `6.0` |  | restart | While the model is silent, refresh the placeholder card this often so users can tell model-wait from a dead bridge. 0 disables. |
| `output_style` | `OUTPUT_STYLE` | string | `segmented` |  | restart | User-facing output policy. 'segmented' sends assistant text as separate Feishu messages at natural boundaries and hides tool-call details. |
| `show_tool_calls` | `SHOW_TOOL_CALLS` | boolean | `false` |  | restart | Reveal which tools/commands ran (SHOW_TOOL_CALLS=1). |
| `outbound_attachment_max_bytes` | `FEISHU_OUTBOUND_ATTACHMENT_MAX_BYTES` | integer | `31457280` |  | restart | Per outbound attachment size cap (bytes) for model-emitted [[rtime-send-file:…]] / [[rtime-send-image:…]] uploads. |
| `handover_model` | `CLAUDE_MODEL` | string | `claude-opus-4-6` |  | restart | Default model recorded in the handover deep-link (handover.py). |
| `watchdog_max_uptime_seconds` | `WATCHDOG_MAX_UPTIME_SECONDS` | number | `14400.0` |  | restart | Forced-restart ceiling: the watchdog restarts the process after this uptime (seconds). 0 disables forced restarts. |
| `ngrok_domain` | `NGROK_DOMAIN` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Dev ngrok tunnel domain for the HTTP callback (local dev only; prod uses the Feishu WebSocket channel). |
